name: baseline
description: Inject your org's governed facts (and personal memories) into every Claude Code session, capture new memories with a [remember: …] tag, and expose Baseline's MCP tools. Point it at your Baseline deployment and identity.

backend_url.title: Baseline URL
backend_url.description: Your Baseline deployment, e.g. https://baseline.acme.com (no trailing slash). Defaults to a local POC backend.

principal.title: Your principal / identity
principal.description: Your Baseline actor id (e.g. your email). Sent as X-Baseline-Principal. Dev/POC identity; real deployments resolve this from OIDC.

api_token.title: API token (optional)
api_token.description: Bearer token, if your Baseline requires auth. Leave blank for the open dev/POC deployment.
